programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on professional poker player Ernie Scherer III, the chief suspect in the 2008 murders of his parents, Charlene and Ernest, in their Castlewood Country Club home in Pleasanton, California.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the 1985 death of Natalie Antonetti, a woman who was part of the Austin, Texas music community. She was found beaten at home by her son, Johnny Goodie, and remained in a coma for two weeks before she died.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El pecado de los padres
programme.desc: Frank busca pruebas contra un sospechoso de matar a un policía que disparó a un compañero de Henry hace años. Danny y Baez investigan una serie de asesinatos relacionados con estrellas de cine para adultos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Equipaje
programme.desc: Danny se siente desconcertado cuando descubre que un grupo de veteranos del ejército altamente entrenados son responsables de un robo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Hogar dulce hogar
programme.desc: Jamie involucra a Danny cuando encuentra a un adolescente sin hogar que afirma que su tía fue asesinada por su novio. Mientras tanto, Erin se enfurece cuando McCoy la reemplaza como fiscal en un caso que involucra a un guardia de prisión.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Historias de amor
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan cuando un propietario dispara a un intruso, solo para descubrir que el intruso es un sicario. Además, un joven abogado intenta hacer justicia para su madre, a quien Erin envió a prisión por un cargo de asesinato hace 12 años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: En Kansas ha habido una serie de tornados donde han sido encontrados cuerpos de adolescentes desmembrados. La UAC es llamada para investigar. Mientras, JJ está preocupada, ya que su hijo Henry había estado enfermo y quería estar con él

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Un caso se vuelve personal para García cuando la UAC investiga la desaparición de una mujer, en su grupo de apoyo a sobrevivientes, cuya hija desapareció hace siete años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un pequeño grupo de jóvenes de la academia militar comete un suicidio en masa, la UAC tiene que ver las verdaderas razones detrás de sus actos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga una serie de brutales asesinatos en Filadelfia, lo que los lleva hasta un escenario donde se practica boxeo en busca del asesino. Por otra parte, Hotch conoce a una atractiva atleta, ya que ambos están entrenando para un triatlón.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El padre de Dinozzo regresa, desempeñando un papel vital en la investigación de un asesinato que podría tener resultados catastróficos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo es asignado para proteger al padre de Ziva, cuando su asistencia a una conferencia de NCIS conduce a algunas sorpresas inesperadas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo busca respuestas después de que una sorprendente emboscada revele un nuevo giro en su investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS investiga la desaparición de un contramaestre de la Marina que es el único testigo en un juicio por asesinato que se avecina.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Historias de amor
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan cuando un propietario dispara a un intruso, solo para descubrir que el intruso es un sicario. Además, un joven abogado intenta hacer justicia para su madre, a quien Erin envió a prisión por un cargo de asesinato hace 12 años.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La puerta de los pobres
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan el asesinato de un residente de bajos ingresos en un edificio de lujo con unidades asequibles. Frank se enfrenta a un problema con un detective amigo de Gormley que abusa de su posición.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to cut a guy some slack after his relationship troubles got out of hand. A teenager gets a serious lesson in not drinking while underage. A couple is forced to take a raincheck on their wedding day.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a traffic stop, a driver drops off his passenger before speeding away. Deputies are amazed when a man offers them an ID that looks nothing like him. Deputies investigate a case of road rage involving a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with multiple felony warrants gets one last taste of freedom before heading to prison. A speeding driver is arrested for the same thing he was arrested for the day before. A runaway suspect leaves a trail behind him.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A very cooperative car thief tells deputies all about his good fortune. An argument over business leaves one man on the ground with a bloody mouth. The occupants of a truck are oblivious to what deputies find in the backseat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist allegedly mistakes a deputy for a thief and tries to escape into the bushes. Police cut a dad some slack by not towing the family car. Two sisters catch the police’s attention when they take their spat to the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An elderly driver sacrifices his own van during his desperate escape attempt. A traffic stop on a suspended driver turns up more than anticipated. Several car occupants learn it’s better to tell the truth from the start.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A family gets a huge scare when a fleeing suspect finds his way into their house. Police sort out a chaotic argument between two childhood friends. A woman in a suspicious vehicle plays fast and loose with the truth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The owner of a stolen truck calls officers when he spots it in a nearby alley. A fleeing driver leads officers on a wild chase over a closed bridge. Police track down a suspect who gave a liquor store employee a phony $100 bill.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A father-to-be kicks off a dangerous vehicle pursuit over something trivial. A car that ducked out of a DUI checkpoint attracts attention. Officers respond to a disturbance caused by a local man’s erratic behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies catch up to a group of teenagers enjoying a night of joyriding. A traffic stop opens the doors to recovery for a very repentant suspect. A suspect insists his car is not stolen because he did his online research.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Recovery of a stolen vehicle uncovers a weapon and a lengthy criminal history. Detectives cross paths with a car that was stolen in a carjacking. Officers speak with a man who has questionable standards regarding gun safety.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man and woman are pulled over while out on a candy run. A simple traffic violation turns into a multi-vehicle police pursuit. Deputies are notified of a stolen car and find the driver in possession of an interesting tool.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distinctive tattoo reveals a wanted felon’s true identity. Deputies talk to a young woman who traded one bad habit for another. A man in possession of a stolen vehicle tells officers how his day went from bad to worse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man receives an enormous break due to public health concerns. Officers are doubtful when two friends claim they were unaware of each other’s actions. Police pull over a car full of people who know very little about themselves.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase involves tire spikes, shredded rubber, and crashed gates. Suspects accused of burglary state they only steal to pay rent. A traffic stop proves there’s always more than meets the eye.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to outrun the law by bicycle but can’t out pedal police. A deputy goes undercover to investigate stolen baseballs. A K-9 discovers hidden contraband on a suspect’s most private places.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seatbelt violation ends in a chase to the confusion of all involved. A suspect with a history of grand theft auto is found in another stolen car. Officers find drugs in a tough part of town.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers smell the pungent odor of marijuana during a minor traffic violation. Cocaine is found on a suspect pulled over for a broken windshield. A store is robbed by someone in a red dress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man accused of burglary claims he’s hallucinating. A suspect tries to show off by parading his white pistol and causes pandemonium. A traffic stop offers an accused man a second chance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: It’s all deputies and dogs on deck in an attempt to subdue a man in distress. A suspect proves to be too sleepy to engage in truck thievery. A baby is rescued in a car with no air conditioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an individual with a saw-like knife. A man accused of auto theft claims his girlfriend allowed him to borrow her wheels. Chiquita the chihuahua helps its owner through hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Stop sticks are deployed to intercept a vehicle with bullets. Two suspects watch their life unravel after being found with meth. Police assist young and restless runaways.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect can’t stop huffing butane. Mistrust proves toxic after a dispute over slot machines. A puppy proves to be the magic charm with individuals who’ve hit a rough patch.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen U-Haul is seized during a felony traffic stop. An unfaithful husband is caught hiding his mistress in the bathroom. Police assist an individual who is going through self-discovery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect forgets to drive away after breaking into a used car lot. A dispute over money ends in tire slashing. Suspects are found with narcotics and tall tales.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect fresh out of jail is found with narcotics. A motorcycle named 'Love Machine' is saved from a hot wire. A man bursts his tire in a bad place and officers come to the rescue.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate two murders that take place at the annual bull riding rodeo in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team battle the flu when they are called upon by DDA Klein to investigate the deaths of several key witnesses for a grand jury case against a dangerous Las Vegas gang.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The disturbing death of a 3-year-old girl has a great impact on Catherine as she searches for clues to her murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass and Nick get help from an unlikely source, an incarcerated criminal (Method Man), when investigating two murders that take place in the same apartment building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover several victims who have green blood, leading them to the conclusion that their deaths are somehow connected.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and the CSI team become involved in the world of Hollywood comedy when a diva sitcom star (Sagal) meets an untimely demise while filming her show in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick is accused of murdering a famous Vegas gangster, and even he is uncertain of his guilt or innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team comes together after Warrick is shot in a Las Vegas alleyway, on the ninth season premiere.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A hypnotist who uses her powers of persuasion to rob banks becomes the prime suspect in a murder investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a series of victims are found deceased seemingly in the middle of everyday activities, the CSIs must determine what is causing them to remain upright after death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: During the course of an investigation, the CSIs discover that their victim, a young woman who was murdered and found with several different blood types in her system, is the daughter of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team investigates a case involving the world of domination, Grissom pays a visit to Lady Heather to help find some answers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: After a shooting involving a young boy occurs right in the middle of Koreatown, none of the witnesses will speak to the CSI team investigating the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The prime suspect in a murder case from 12 years earlier comes to the forefront of a new CSI investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo acude a tres escenarios de diferentes crímenes en una misma noche. Aparentemente, no están relacionados, pero las pruebas forenses de cada caso revela un vínculo común.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el CSI va a la escena del crimen en un motel familiar, Nick comienza a relacionar tres asesinatos que se han cometido allí ese año.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston y Riley son tomados como rehenes después de un tiroteo en una comunidad normalmente tranquila de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un antiguo alumno de Ray es asesinado. La investigación les llevará hasta el mundo de la lucha libre mexicana.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El caso de Nick sobre un paracaidista herido dará un giro cuando Catherine descubra que está relacionado con un caso de doble asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Hodges y Wendy se encuentran en una convención de ciencia ficción de uno de sus programas de televisión favoritos, terminan investigando el asesinato de uno de sus queridos actores.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine revisa uno de los primeros casos en los que trabajó como CSI cuando el delincuente condenado por el asesinato afirma que el veredicto se basó en pruebas defectuosas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una enfermedad inexplicable que afecta a ciudadanos al azar de Las Vegas desconcierta a los CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un brutal asesinato por parte de una banda de motociclistas tiene lugar en un bar de motocicletas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un botín de fichas perdidas de un casino cerrado aparece en Las Vegas y le sigue una serie de asesinatos, lo que lleva a Langston a usar la fuerza letal por primera vez en su carrera como CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Sara regresa inesperadamente, el equipo de CSI se une para investigar la muerte de una famosa joven actriz fallecida en un dudoso accidente de tránsito.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un productor de pornografía y un traficante de drogas son encontrados muertos en un área exclusiva de Las Vegas, el equipo de CSI centra su investigación en los miembros del vecindario.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando dos compañeros de oficina conspiran para robar un casino, su plan termina con los CSI investigando un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un policía mata a otro oficial, el CSI debe buscar las pruebas para determinar si el tiroteo fue premeditado o un accidente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man is decapitated while doing a daring stunt with his car, the team suspects that it was more than just an accident.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio uncovers a deadly plot against the City of Miami after a young woman is murdered at a charity event. He and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a Marine recruiter is murdered, the CSIs must delve into the world of enlisting soldiers and the families they leave behind.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Sonya Barak is standing trial for aiding in a plot to destroy Miami when her own people try to gun her down. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Natalia's ex-husband is murdered, evidence suggests that she killed him. Many people had a motive to kill Nick. Horatio and the CSIs investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Det. Frank Tripp's life hangs in the balance when he steps on a land mine while investigating a crime scene. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a truck full of confiscated weapons is hijacked and the weapons are released back into the public, Horatio links the crime to Clavo Cruz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A member of the team is pronounced dead after being shot in the head. Not wanting to give up, Horatio has the CSI rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must investigate when the parents of a baby sitter in an upscale neighborhood are brutally murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A hunting weekend turns deadly when someone in the group is mauled by a bear and evidence suggests foul play. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate developer is killed, Horatio and the CSI team suspect his wife and her two secret twin sisters.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio suspects that the County Supervisor and the owners of a nearby Native American Casino may be involved when a murder victim is found scalped.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team investigate a movie star's death while he was in a celebrity rehab center and on the verge of exposing some damaging secrets.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.desc: Un aristócrata arruinado casa a su hija con un rico ranchero para no caer en la pobreza, sin saber que este es más astuto que ellos y los pone a trabajar duro en el campo.

programme.title: El enamorado
programme.desc: Martin Corona encuentra el amor y promote a su esposa a no volver a usar armas, hasta que sus enemigos lo obligan a volver a luchar, ahora por defender a su propia familia.

programme.title: Cuidado con el amor
programme.desc: Pedro, con la ayuda de dos mejores amigos de su padre busca un tesoro enterrado en una hacienda colonial. Elsa y su madre quieren impedirlo. Al fin el amor interviene y Pedro y Elsa comparten la fortuna y su felicidad.

programme.title: Esos de Penjamo
programme.desc: Un ranchero se casa con su prima para que sus herederos puedan quedarse con sus propiedades cuando muera. Al no poder quedar en embarazo, su ambiciosa cuñada toma provecho de la situación.

programme.title: Kalifornia
programme.desc: Una pareja decide ir a conocer los lugares donde se cometieron los crímenes de un libro de asesinos en serie, pero ni se imaginan que no tienen que ir muy lejos para conocer a unos brutales criminales.

programme.title: Tierra de policias
programme.desc: El director de Ford vs. Ferrari junta a un elenco de estrellas que incluye a Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone, Ray Liotta y Harvey Keitel en este tenso thriller lleno de acción y crimen.

programme.title: Justicia verdadera
programme.desc: El asesino de "Black Magic" anda suelto, asesinando bailarinas que encajan misteriosamente con la descripción de la nueva policía Sarah Montgomery.

programme.title: Amores peligrosos
programme.desc: En este drama criminal, Matthew McConaughey (El club de los desahuciados) interpreta a un reportero que regresa a su ciudad natal de Florida para investigar un caso que involucra a un preso condenado a muerte.

programme.title: Número De Suerte
programme.desc: John Travolta y Lisa Kudrow forman un "equipo de comedia de alta energía" en esta comedia divertida inspirada en una estafa de la vida real para ganar la lotería de Pensilvania.

programme.title: Tierra de policias
programme.desc: El director de Ford vs. Ferrari junta a un elenco de estrellas que incluye a Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone, Ray Liotta y Harvey Keitel en este tenso thriller lleno de acción y crimen.

programme.title: Manhattan en la oscuridad
programme.desc: Cuando una viuda seductora le pide a un periodista que resuelva la misteriosa muerte de su marido, la investigación lo sumerge en un peligroso mundo de adulterio, chantaje y asesinato.

programme.title: Salvador
programme.desc: Es 1980. Los jóvenes, las mujeres y los niños están siendo brutalmente asesinados en una sangrienta guerra civil en El Salvador. Es un escenario horrible, pero perfecto para Richard Boyle, reportero gráfico de guerra cuya carrera necesita un impulso.

programme.title: La más grande historia jamás contada
programme.desc: La vida de Jesús en la Palestina ocupada por Roma: su nacimiento en Belén, su infancia en Nazaret, la última cena, la traición de su discípulo Judas, su juicio, crucifixión y posterior resurrección.

programme.title: El último castillo
programme.desc: Sus servicios al país lo hicieron un héroe pero un error lo convirtió en prisionero. Para el General Eugene Irwin (Robert Redford) es solo cuestión de cumplir su sentencia, hasta que descubre que otros presos están siendo asesinados.

programme.title: Frida (ESP)
programme.desc: Salma Hayek triunfa en esta película biográfica de una mujer excepcional que vivió una vida inolvidable, Frida Kahlo. Está dirigida por Julie Taymor y cuenta con un elenco de apoyo que incluye a Alfred Molina, Antonio Banderas y Diego Luna.

programme.title: Sin salida
programme.desc: Un encubrimiento y una caza de brujas ocurren después de que un político mata accidentalmente a su amante. Kevin Costner y Gene Hackman protagonizan esta tensa historia de suspenso político.

programme.title: Perro salvaje
programme.desc: Una historia desarrollada en Indochina en 1959. Una tierra más allá de las reglas, una época despiadada y el nacimiento de una legenda.

programme.title: El gringo
programme.desc: "El hombre" cruza a México con $2,000,000 en efectivo y un plan para vivir lo que le queda en la playa, pero se queda atrapado en el pueblo "El Fronteras". Bajo ataque de policías corruptos, debe salvar "El Fronteras" a través de espectaculares tiroteos.

programme.title: La suburban dorada
programme.desc: Un policía judicial es acusado de estar relacionado con el narcotráfico sólo por ayudar a su primo. Las circunstancias lo convierten en un fugitivo de la ley y por recuperar a su hijo tiene que involucrase con el narco.

programme.title: Asesinatos accidentales
programme.desc: Mike Fallon es un sicario experimentado conocido por hacer que la muerte de sus objetivos parezca un accidente. Cuando su novia aparece muerta, él va tras sus antiguos colegas para encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: Asesinatos accidentales: unas vacaciones para morir
programme.desc: Mike Fallon está de regreso y debe vencer a los mejores asesinos del mundo, para proteger al hijo de un jefe de la mafia, salvar la vida de su único amigo y reavivar su relación con su figura paterna.

programme.title: Diablo
programme.desc: Un joven veterano de la guerra civil se ve obligado a emprender un viaje desesperado para salvar a su esposa secuestrada. Arriesgándolo todo para rescatar a la mujer que ama, este western lleno de acción toma y giros.

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: Max 2: el héroe de la casa blanca
programme.desc: Max, el héroe canino del servicio secreto del presidente de Estados Unidos, vuelve a la acción. Debe mantener a la hija del lider ruso y al hijo del presidente a salvo mientras descubren un alarmante complot que pone en peligro a ambas naciones.

programme.title: School of Life (LAS)
programme.desc: Un nuevo maestro se enfrenta a su malhumorado competidor por el premio al maestro del año.

programme.title: Un perro de otro mundo
programme.desc: Owen, de 12 años, tiene un nuevo perro, Hubble, que además de sentarse y quedarse quieto, habla, ¡literalmente! Resulta que Hubble es un agente interplanetario, ¡y Owen descubre que Hubble y todos sus amigos caninos tienen la misión de dominar el mundo!

programme.title: Perro Genial
programme.desc: Una familia debe mudarse a un apartamento en la ciudad de Nueva York que tenga una política estricta de no mascotas.

programme.title: Max
programme.desc: Un perro que ayudó a los soldados en Afganistán vuelve a los EUA, donde lo adopta la familia de su adiestrador tras sufrir una experiencia traumática.

programme.title: Max 2: el héroe de la casa blanca
programme.desc: Max, el héroe canino del servicio secreto del presidente de Estados Unidos, vuelve a la acción. Debe mantener a la hija del lider ruso y al hijo del presidente a salvo mientras descubren un alarmante complot que pone en peligro a ambas naciones.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Cuando Tripp descubre a una criatura llamada Creech que consume mucha gasolina, un dúo poco probable se une para una aventura divertida, graciosa y sincera, en un Monster Truck súper poderoso para reunir a Creech con su familia.

programme.title: La Pantera Rosa 2
programme.desc: Steve Martin vuelve a divertirnos encarnando al torpe Inspector Jacques Clouseau. Esta vez debe descubrir quién ha robado la Pantera Rosa, un diamante de valor inestimable, y otros tesoros del mundo. Coprotagonizada por Jean Reno y John Cleese.

programme.title: De fiesta en las alturas
programme.desc: Un elenco estelar, que incluye a Tom Arnold, Kevin Hart, Method Man y Snoop Dogg se apodera de los cielos en esta irreverente comedia sobre una aerolínea que ofrece sensuales sobrecargos, casino y el antro de moda a ¡10,000 metros de altura!

programme.title: Beavis y Butt-head, la película
programme.desc: Cuando se roban su TV, Beavis y Butt-head emprenden camino en una hilarante película debut que les muestra a millones de fanáticos lo que ya saben: ¡Beavis y Butt-head son le mejor!

programme.title: Jefe de estado
programme.desc: Cuando Washington necesita desesperadamente un candidato presidencial que sea garantía de perder las elecciones, escogen a Mayes Gilliam (Chris Rock), un desconocido político local de barrio, para que sea su títere.

programme.title: Tira a mamá del tren
programme.desc: Un ex-marido amargado, un niño de mamá. Ambos la quieren muerta, pero ¿quién se encargará de hacerlo?.

programme.title: Norbit (ESP)
programme.desc: Murphy protagoniza a un Norbit apacible, que recibe una segunda oportunidad con el amor de su infancia, Kate. Sin embargo, los obstáculos podrían complicar este romance más de lo esperado.

programme.title: La mujer de mis pesadillas
programme.desc: Ben Stiller personifica a Eddie, el soltero empedernido de 40 años que finalmente da el "sí" a la hermosa Lila. Pero durante la luna de miel, la mujer de sus sueños resulta ser una completa pesadilla.

programme.title: El Crimen del Padre Amaro LAS
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: 7 Soles
programme.desc: Un "pollero" contratado para cruzar a un grupo de indocumentados decide que éste será su último viaje para la organización. Los jefes sospechan de él y mandan a El Gavilán a vigilarlo. Los polleros se traicionan, perdiendo parte de su "carga" humana.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Cara o sello
programme.desc: Carlos Mendoza es un policía honesto. Cuando no acepta un soborno y encarcela a los culpables, despierta la ira de un narcotraficante local, que secuestra a su familia y lo hace elegir entre su familia, su carrera y su compañero.

programme.title: Ponchao
programme.desc: Alex is destined to become the greatest baseball player ever — and he'll do anything to make it happen. But the road to success proves to be hilariously unpredictable. Subtitled.

programme.title: Aqui Entre Nos (LAS)
programme.desc: Cansado de ser dado por sentado por su esposa y sus 3 hijas, Rodolfo Guerra se levanta una mañana y decide no ir a trabajar. Entonces comienza la locura.

programme.title: Todos los perros van al cielo: Un cuento de navidad
programme.desc: Tres perros defenderán con uñas y dientes las Navidades, en un esfuerzo por salvarlas de un espíritu malvado (Carface) que quiere utilizar perros de todo el mundo para arruinar la Navidad.

programme.title: Una Navidad como príncipe y mendigo
programme.desc: Un informante secreto desaparece y un joven agente contrata a un doble para interpretar su papel.

programme.title: Última oportunidad para Navidad
programme.desc: Justo antes de Navidad, el encargado del almacén de Santa debe apresurarse a encontrar un reemplazo para un reno herido. Cuando encuentra uno, surgen complicaciones y amor.

programme.title: Tregua de Navidad
programme.desc: Un soldado americano y una Belga se enamoran durante un festivo de tregua, en medio de una de las batallas de la 2da Guerra Mundial. Cuando vuelven al campo de guerra, prometen reunirse en Navidad.

programme.title: Lucy shimmers y el príncipe de la paz
programme.desc: Otra oportunidad aparece cuando un duro criminal se encuentra con una preciosa niña que es ayudada por un ángel para cambiar los corazones durante la Navidad.

programme.title: Una Navidad como príncipe y mendigo
programme.desc: Un informante secreto desaparece y un joven agente contrata a un doble para interpretar su papel.

programme.title: Última oportunidad para Navidad
programme.desc: Justo antes de Navidad, el encargado del almacén de Santa debe apresurarse a encontrar un reemplazo para un reno herido. Cuando encuentra uno, surgen complicaciones y amor.

programme.title: Fantasmas
programme.desc: 150 muertos y 350 desaparecidos en la pequeña ciudad montañosa de Snowfield, Colorado. Y ese es tan solo el comienzo...

programme.title: Chucky el muñeco diabólico
programme.desc: El joven Andy es el único que sabe que su muñeco, Chucky, está poseído por el alma de un asesino y que ha cometido varios crímenes macabros. Pero el verdadero terror empieza cuando Chucky decide transferir su espíritu maligno a un humano... Andy.

programme.title: El Perfume: Historia de un asesino
programme.desc: En Francia, en el siglo 18, vivió Jean-Baptiste Grenouille, que nació con un gran sentido del olfato. Pero cuando su don se transforma en obsesión, lucha por crear el perfume más excitante del mundo matando jovencitas para capturar su esencia.

programme.title: Día de la madre
programme.desc: Rebecca DeMornay brinda una interpretación aterradora en este baño de sangre brutal. Cuando sus hijos entran a una casa y toman como rehenes a los dueños; ella les enseña cómo es la verdadera tortura. Coprotagonizada por Shawn Ashmore.

programme.title: Especies
programme.desc: Un experimento genético genera a una hermosa mujer mutante que amenaza a la raza humana.

programme.title: Especies III
programme.desc: A medida que su especie se extingue por infecciones y enfermedades, una alienígena seductora inmunológicamente más fuerte se convierte en la única esperanza para que sigan viviendo.

programme.title: La leyenda del jinete sin cabeza
programme.desc: Johnny Depp es Ichabod Crane, un investigador decidido a detener los asesinatos del Jinete Sin Cabeza.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: The Rainmaker
programme.desc: Katharine Hepburn garnered an Oscar nomination as the "plain yet magnetically beautiful" tomboy rancher, with Burt Lancaster brilliantly cast in the role of the smooth-talking con man.

programme.title: The Shooting
programme.desc: A mysterious woman persuades two cowboys to help her in a revenge scheme.

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: Stacy Keach, Haris Yulin, and Faye Dunaway give riveting performances in this controversial and myth-shattering reexamination of the darker side of gunslinger Doc Holliday and the actions that led to the infamous showdown in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: The White Buffalo
programme.desc: Charles Bronson and Will Sampson star as Wild Bill Hickok and Chief Crazy Horse in this one-of-a-kind western that finds both western legends braving the snowy wilderness in search of the demon that haunts them both, the fabled White Buffalo!

programme.title: From Noon Till Three
programme.desc: Charles Bronson plays Graham Dorsey, a bank robber who, through a series of twists and turns finds himself the object of national adoration. A beautiful widow, Amanda Starbuck (Jill Ireland) is responsible for creating this myth.

programme.title: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: A stellar cast, including Michael Caine, Laurence Olivier and Christopher Plummer highlights this epic telling of the greatest air battle in history, when the outnumbered Royal Air Force defeated the German Luftwaffe, saving England from invasion.

programme.title: A Canterbury Tale
programme.desc: Set amid the tumult of the Second World War, the film follows three modern-day incarnations of Chaucer’s pilgrims, who are forced to solve a bizarre village crime in the English countryside en route to the mythical town of Canterbury.

programme.title: Lilies Of The Field
programme.desc: Nominated for 5 Academy Awards® including Best Picture and winner of the Best Actor Oscar® for Sidney Poitier for his role as an itinerant handyman who stops to help five impoverished nuns and the small Arizona desert town in which they reside.

programme.title: Beach Party
programme.desc: It's the film that launched a genre and an iconic screen pairing as Frankie Avalon and Annette Funicello team for the first time for sand, surf and fun as an anthropologist (Robert Cummings) studies the wild dating habits of Malibu teenagers!

programme.title: Muscle Beach Party
programme.desc: Frankie Avalon and Annette Funicello and the gang are back together in the 2nd of American International's Beach Party films and this time the beach is overrun by muscle men and their obnoxious trainer.

programme.title: Bikini Beach
programme.desc: There are big waves crashing at Bikini Beach! The beach is close to becoming a retirement village. And a British pop star comes between Dee Dee (Annette Funicello) and Frankie (Frankie Avalon). Will it all be resolved by the end of summer vacation?

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter asks Gomer to take his place on a date.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude is spending every spare minute with a handsome, best-selling author and Walter resents it. Walter thinks Barry Witherspoon is a pompous bore, regardless of his sexual preferences, but Maude defends him and accuses Walter of bigotry.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude and Walter are ecstatic. Walter's ex-wife, Marta, plans to remarry and the alimony monkey will be off his back. There's a flag on the play, however, when Maude meets Marta and learns the identity of the intended bridegroom.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: A famed psychic predicts four things will happen to Maude -- the fourth prediction being that she will marry a fifth time. At first, Maude scoffs at the predictions, but then begins to worry when the first three come true.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Would you believe Maude as the college campus queen doing a striptease? That's what happens when Maude gives a New Year's Eve party and insists the guests come dressed as their favorite year.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: The Findlays and their friends rejoin the world of 'showbiz' when Tuckahoe's Gallbladder Foundation enlists Maude to produce their charity telethon.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Carol's in love and Maude couldn't be happier -- until she learns Carol's 'intended' already has a wife and she happens to be one of Maude's oldest friends.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude recruits Vivian into women's liberation and possible out of her marriage. Arthur takes a dim view of anything that might keep Vivian away from her 'daily chores' and warns her that her 'revolutionary' attitude may be destroying their marriage.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Mrs. Naugatuck's strange behavior worries the Findlays until she tells them she's in love and plans to get married. Maude plans a surprise bridal shower for Mrs. Naugatuck, but there's an even bigger surprise in store for everyone.

programme.title: The Odd Couple (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Oscar loses money in a poker game and when he can't pay the debt in cash, he donates Felix's band, the Sophisticados, to Billie Joe as payment instead.

programme.title: The Odd Couple (CBS TV)
programme.desc: When Oscar learns the park where he and his cronies played baseball is going to be the site for an office building, Oscar becomes civic-minded and decides to run for city councilman.

programme.title: The Odd Couple (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Singer-composer Paul Williams is the special guest star in this episode written especially for him. Felix Unger's daughter has a crush on Williams and runs away from home to follow him wherever he appears.

programme.title: The Odd Couple (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Felix discovers that his father and Oscar's knew each other in the old days and that Oscar's father was responsible for Felix's father's downfall.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Riotous confusion prevails when Latka Gravas' split personalities prompt Elaine and Alex to take him to a psychiatrist's office, where the predicament takes on a wild new twist as Latka takes on Alex's personality.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Cabbie Jim Ignatowski's legendary psychic powers hilariously thrust him into the hectic world of television programming when he predicts that a TV show will be a hit.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie, at Zena's behest, comforts a girl with boyfriend woes, which leads to zany romantic tangles. Zena's rejected friend uses Louie's narrow shoulders to cry on, unleashing an unexpected comedy adventure that grants him some macho bragging rights.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie the dispatcher is gleeful, but Alex is aghast when the romantic affair between Alex and the new waitress at Mario's is complicated by another suitor.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie (Don Grady) might not be able to play in his school's football game unless he can improve his grades in math. Also, Chip (Stanley Livingston) has a cold and later catches the measles.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve's friend (Barbara Eiler) asks him to help find out who is dating her daughter (Brenda Scott). She thinks it is an older man. A mix up, caused by a borrowed fraternity pin, causes Steve to think it is Mike who is dating the daughter.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Chip gets the chance to visit his father's work place and to see what his father does for a living. Chip thinks the job is boring and of no consequence. However, when Steve is asked to help a pilot land a plane, Chip gets a different view.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Mike and Robbie plan to spend their summer vacation working in a different town to earn money.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob puts his job at risk when he convinces Alan Brady to host a cultural documentary program.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Laura takes two of Millie's prescription pills and suffers disastrous side effects.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob tries to get a raise for Buddy and Sally from Alan Brady's tight-fisted accountant.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob struggles to hide his flu symptoms at a family party rather than admit Laura was right to warn him about golfing in damp conditions.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Dr. Janet Craig, rebuffed as a physician by the local males, sets out to win them over as a woman--and a good cook.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: In an attempt to get rid of lady Dr. Craig, Uncles Joe flakes an illness that becomes real.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The murder in Hawaii of a famous Nazi-hunter and the discovery on his bullet-riddled body of a rare World War II German medal pulls Steve McGarrett and Five-O into the search for a Nazi war criminal.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Someone is waging a bloody vendetta against a band of innocuous birdwatchers. Although Steve McGarrett feels certain that slaughter will continue, he can't comprehend the "who" and "why" of the killer.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Paul Burke guest stars as attorney David Lawrence, a political candidate whose promising bid for the U.S. Senate is endangered by the murder of a man who tried to blackmail him.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: While investigating the whereabouts of millions of embezzled money, Barnaby uncovers fraud, blackmail, and a couple of murders committed by a man who is supposed to be dead.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby is hired to investigate the alleged suicide of a very wealthy woman's husband. What he discovers is another investigator who supplements his income with blackmail, and will murder anyone who gets in his way.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: An imprisoned dying man makes a deal with a murderer to take the rap for the man's crimes, just as long as he will financially take care of his wife after he's gone. But when the deal goes sour, Barnaby is hired to see to it that justice is served.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Three otherwise ordinary guys who carpool together plan a $335,000 heist, but when things go horribly wrong and it turns into a case of murder, Barnaby Jones gets involved.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix uncovers an unsolved homicide while protecting a controversial writer.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: An art collector sees a woman modelling for a sculptor who looks exactly like the subject of his Renoir painting but she flees so he hires Intertect and Mannix to find her.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A deaf woman "overhears" a portion of a kidnapping/murder plot. Mannix tries to determine the victim's identity and whereabouts before the time limit to pay the ransom.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Charlie Anderson, a retired policeman who once saved Joe Mannix's life, hires him when his wife has run away. The wife is someone Charlie met while on active duty - she'd been a prostitute who went straight.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A sniper is randomly shooting people in a high-rise building and threatens to continue doing it until he is paid a million dollars.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: The wife of a prison inmate is shot and killed in a laundromat in what looks like a professional hit.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After Jeannie's friend Nancy kills one of her rapists, Jeannie is furious at the way the justice system works.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is hired by a construction boss to replace his female assistant, who bitterly resents the intrusion.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Eileen Heckert repeats a guest starring role -- she originated as a nun who aids Kimble in tracking the one-armed man.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: While investigating a murder, McCall is shot and paralyzed after learning about a prostitution ring operating along the highway in a fleet of motor homes.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: As doctors prepare to operate on the paralyzed McCall, Hunter races against time to exonerate himself and find whoever is killing potential witnesses in a deadly prostitution case.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: When Hunter disappears during an investigation of organized crime, McCall and her new partner must find him before he's killed

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A devastating earthquake causes widespread damage and Dr. Sloan's hospital goes on emergency power. After the tremors stop, Mark's friend Martin Garfield is found dead in the ruins of his mansion nearby. Was it the earthquake or murder?

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve's undercover waterfront surveillance causes city-wide panic. His suspect, a gangland hit man, has suddenly developed the plague!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Posing as a visiting missionary, Dr. Sloan goes undercover at a convent to reveal the location and contents of a most mysterious package - a parcel that brought its owner to a sudden, untimely death.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Bobby's mother and cousin visit and set off a series of unwelcome, dangerous surprises.

programme.title: Renegade

programme.desc: Fear takes over for the new Training Camp Candidates as they face the reality of doing the DCC kick line & jump splits for the first time. Dreams come true if only temporarily, as the girls try on the uniform for the first time.

programme.desc: To be a DCC, you need to look like a DCC. This week Kelli makes sure all the girls have the look. The final rehearsal of the week brings emotions to the forefront as a girl gets sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the candidates enter the sixth week of training camp they need to start looking like a DCC or their spot is in jeopardy. Melissa Rycroft and former DCC Tina Kalina sit in for Judy and give Kelli some fresh eyes.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With three girls left to cut and the first game around the corner, the pressure is intense as the girls return to AT&T Stadium to take the field for the first time since auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The final day of training camp has everyone nervous because Kelli and Judy might take a squad of less than 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This season 400 hundred girls that have dared to dream they can become a world-famous Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, put it all on the line, as preliminary auditions for the 2015-2016 season begin.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Talent and looks alone won't get you on the squad. Dreams are made and hopes are crushed as only 46 out of 59 candidates make it into Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As Training Camp starts Kelli lays down the law. Girls start to crack as the reality of how hard it is to become a DCC sets in. Melissa Rycroft offers hope and advice on how to make it through.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy must cut 10 girls to get to the magic number of 36 for the squad. Uniform Fittings gives Kelli a better idea of who has the whole package. As the cuts begin so does emotional end of dreams.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the girls get the DCC look, it helps some and not others. Two surprise guests stop by rehearsal and rock the DCC's world. Kelli has one of the most awkward office visits of all time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Cameos and Show Group auditions push the new girls and vets to their limits. Melissa Rycroft tries to save a DCC that's hanging by a thread and there is a shocking outcome from a Kelli office visit.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emotions are supercharged as Kelli & Judy make a lot of tough cuts to keep up the quality of the team. Melissa Rycroft offers invaluable field experience.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli finally announces the squad. Injuries threaten the opening of Cowboys training camp. Game Day chaos endangers a flawless performance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented hopefuls arrive to try out for the best cheerleading team in the world, while many of the returning girls are looking for redemption. New judges increase the pressure of moving on to Finals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Veterans fight for their jobs as new girls try to live their dreams and make DCC Training Camp. Standing in their way is; panel Interviews, solos, an exhausting dance combination and a room full of very tough judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The new candidates' eyes are opened as they get a taste of what it is to be a DCC. As girls struggle to learn the dances, the reality of being "Big Time", sets in. Melissa Rycroft meets the new girls for the first time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the first cut looming, the girls must push their dance skills to the limit. Melissa Rycroft works to bring out showmanship. Extra stress is added on Makeover day as the girls try to get the DCC look.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: New insights into the real story of the very private royal, including a look at Diana's troubled marriage, her turbulent life in the royal family and the investigation into her death.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A couple goes on a scuba-diving vacation in the British Virgin Islands; on the final dive of the trip, one of them surfaces -- but the other does not.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A Kentucky man is convicted of murdering his co-worker; the mystery is considered solved until a stunning disclosure years later turns the closed case upside down.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An Air Force captain is shot dead leaving police to suspect his wife and her Army sharpshooter lover.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man is shot and killed while picking up his daughter for a court-ordered visit.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: As Hurricane Charley ravages a small town in Florida, a man trying to avoid his past hides out in a hotel room.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A young art student from Texas is found murdered in her bed with no sign of forced entry, indicating that she knew her killer.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A mother of two mysteriously vanishes from her parents' Michigan home while going to check the mailbox, leaving her phone and identification behind; police declare her dead without discovering a body.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An advocate for missing and murdered Indigenous women searches for answers in the disappearance of her niece and exposes cracks in law enforcement.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The father of an Alabama teenager calls the police after he returns home to find his son had thrown a party, leaving the place trashed; 11 minutes after the deputy leaves the house, another 911 call is placed reporting a shooting at the residence.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An Air Force captain is shot dead leaving police to suspect his wife and her Army sharpshooter lover.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man is shot and killed while picking up his daughter for a court-ordered visit.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: As Hurricane Charley ravages a small town in Florida, a man trying to avoid his past hides out in a hotel room.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Vinny bring the boardwalk to California, jealousy rises as sparks fly between Pauly and another single, and the group reveals their dirty laundry.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Vinny face off for the chance at a one-on-one date with a single, and emotions run high throughout the house when Nikki starts a rumor.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Vinny face off in a Double Shot debate, the singles vote for superlatives in the house, and Nikki shows the guys a different side of herself.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Coming in hot with her aggressive, confrontational approach, Pauly and Vinny's Jersey Shore roommate Angelina drops in to sort out which ladies are there for the right reason.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Vinny's bromance hits a rough patch when they both fall for the same woman, and drama erupts in the house when Nikki's jealousy rubs the other ladies the wrong way.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: The ladies confront their relationship baggage, test out their maternal instincts during a day with Pauly's 'daughter' and pack for a trip on a private jet with the guys.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: After Pauly takes the ladies to Houston to get a taste of his DJ lifestyle, Vinny takes them to Staten Island to get grilled by his Jersey Shore roommate Nicole.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Vinny see a different side of the women when the singles' friends and family members visit the house, and Ronnie and Jenni drop by and bring a surprise with them.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: The truth comes out when Jersey Shore's Jenni and Ronnie subject the singles to a lie detector test, and Pauly and Vinny go on their final one-on-one dates.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Before the final Cab Ceremony, Pauly and Vinny's moms drop by to meet the remaining ladies, and the guys decide who they want to ask for a shot at love.

programme.title: I Love New York: Do You Have Love For New York?
programme.desc: After getting her heart broken not once but twice, New York summons 20 single men to her mansion with the hope of finding true love. The guys think its one big party until New York's mom busts in through the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Mangeant
programme.desc: Chamo, NY's Assistant, calls the 15 guys to the backyard for a meeting. New York addresses them from her balcony – they will be competing in a male beauty pageant, a mangeant, and the winners will get dates with her.

programme.title: I Love New York: Big Ballers
programme.desc: The remaining 12 guys start their day with the usual trash-talking until Chamo delivers a New York Note.

programme.title: I Love New York: What's Up Dog
programme.desc: Chamo delivers a New York Note to the guys: it says that NY wants a man that is good with his hands. The remaining 9 guys will break up into 3 teams of 3 and build dog houses for NY's Chihuahua, Her Majesty.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Loveable high school choir director Bryce Gage has big dreams for his small town of Marble Falls, TX.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Restaurateur and newlywed George Stathoulis and his big Greek family take over the show.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The Motor City brings John West, father of five sons, to the stage. The retired automotive line worker wants to retire in comfort and provide an even better future for his sons.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Howie can't keep up with Missy Silverman, a bundle of boundless energy who explodes into celebratory cartwheels.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Sony Avalos says she's one of Deal or No Deal's biggest fans and knows how to play the game better than anyone.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Real-life Las Vegas hero Justin Uhart hits the stage ready risk it all for $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: It's a Deal or No Deal doubleheader. Up first is cheerleader "Tex" Iniguez, followed by bowling dynamo and entrepreneur Kyera Chandler.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Double the deals, double the drama-with bowling champion Kyera Chandler and then elementary school "princi-PAL" Carri Nevad.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Flight attendant Max Reynolds is used to high-flying adventures, and this father of three is buckled up and ready to blast off against The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Playing for his dream home, former bingo caller Tony Oriente turns Deal or No Deal into a giant Tony love-fest.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Business owner La'Sherrie Butler-Hogan brings the house down by belting out an incredible strategy-with an even more amazing voice-as she takes on The Banker.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Miami police officer and Ironman competitor Jorge Montero is on patrol..for a million dollars.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Real estate agent Toni Miller is used to buying and selling hot properties. Howie has just the challenge for her: a Monopoly-inspired game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: College wrestler-turned-professional MMA fighter Michael Chandler proves just how tough he is when he enters the cage with The Banker.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby can't stand the idea of Parents Night - the last time his divorced parents were in the same room they had a huge, embarrassing fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy's eight-month anniversary is coming up - and so is the question of whether or not to have sex. Paige is playing Juliet opposite Jimmy's English-class Romeo and she's planting doubts in Ashley's mind.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy desperately wants to make the basketball team. But, surprisingly, it looks like Sean is surpassing him as a possible star player.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a long absence overseas, Ashley's dad is back in town. She's enjoying his company and attention, but something tells her there's a piece of his life that's being kept from her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lacking real family time at home, Jimmy has been spending more and more time at Ashley's house. He and Toby are like brothers and Kate's begun referring to him as her "third kid".

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Recently diagnosed with a learning disorder, an embarrassed Liberty is ashamed to tell her friends about her tutoring sessions. Emma sees one of Liberty's private sessions and, putting two-and-two together with Liberty's suspicious behaviour, asks J.T.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Sean asks Emma what she's doing tonight, Emma's thrilled - that's a date, right? But nervous Sean is unable to muster the courage to arrange the details and Emma misunderstands his hesitancy as rejection.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Paige decides to start a Spirit Squad at Degrassi, Emma can't believe that the "sexist" sport of cheerleading is being revived. But Manny, who's had years of gymnastics training and is desperate for something to help make her "cool"

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley's convinced that she and Terri are going to be the stars of the school talent show, singing her new (and incredibly earnest) ballad. Terri would rather add Paige -- and some fun sparkle -- to the act, but she's not sure how to tell Ashley that.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with the pressure of passing Grade 7 on his second time around and his mother's newest threat to take him back to his unhappy life up north, Sean is beginning to slip into old, angry patterns.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Perfect Ashley is beginning to bore even herself. With their parents away for the weekend, Ashley decides to join Toby in breaking the "one-guest-each" rule and invites Paige and Hazel to join her and Terri.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Spike reveals the identity of the mystery man she's been dating, Emma is shocked. Mr. Simpson - her teacher! Emma claims she’s okay with it, but if that’s true, why is suddenly being so rude to Mr. Simpson?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley feels like an outcast. Nobody's willing to forget how she treated them at her party last year. Ash decides to take action, swallows her pride and apologizes to everyone. And it works. She boasts to Terri about her success- it’s like last year

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's Science Fair time at Degrassi. Emma’s a serious contender for first prize, but when the results of her experiment don't fall in line with her hypothesis, she's in a panic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Joey is going away for the weekend with his latest girlfriend, and Craig is surprised when Joey tells him he can stay on his own – and even have the guys over! When the guys get to Craig’s for the weekend, they can’t think of much to do

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Degrassi Panthers have a new star soccer player, Spinner. His victory’s even sweeter when Paige agrees to a movie. When the losing team's defensive back, the gorgeous Dean, invites a smitten Paige to a house party, she cancels on Spinner.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Haunted by memories of her recent sexual assault, Paige is desperately trying to appear normal. A girl band contest sounds like a great distraction. Terri wants to reunite PMS—including Ashley. Paige refuses and recruits Hazel instead.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby is tired of being an invisible computer geek so he decides to join a sports team. Girls love wrestlers - that includes Toby’s crush Kendra. To Toby's dismay, the few extra pounds he carries put him in the same weight class as athletic Sean.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s crush on Craig has reached huge proportions and everyone’s urging her to ask him out already! But Manny’s a romantic; she thinks the guy ought to do the asking

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Grade Nine International Day is coming up and Hazel isn’t thrilled. After all, Hazel’s Jamaican and everybody loves the islands - right? When the day arrives, Hazel’s display is a hit, but she isn’t acting like herself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie are the best of friends. But Ellie is starting to want more…Marco though can’t seem to respond in kind. He’s more and more confused about what and who he’s looking for…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When class clown JT acts up in Science class, his teacher Ms. Hatzilakos gives him a serious detention - assisting her with the guinea pigs all week. JT’s annoyed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Sean. He and Emma are back together. He’s a star on the basketball team. And he and Jimmy have buried the hatchet. Jimmy’s even invited him to a party. But the good feelings don’t last for long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A look at bizarre dinosaurs such as the curious buck-toothed Exipdexipteryx, the amazing four-winged Microraptor and the pot-bellied Nothronychus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.desc: Mel and Pex play cat and mouse with the lethal cleaner robots.

programme.desc: Kroagnon has been reborn and is using a reanimated corpse to move around.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.desc: The Doctor discovers the difference between the two Dalek factions.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that he has arrived on Earth the year 2017 A.D. and that he is the exact double of a would-be dictator called Salamander.

programme.title: Doctor Who

programme.title: Doctor Who

programme.title: Doctor Who

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Traitorous scientist Kent has blown up the research station infiltrated by the Doctor; not long afterward, Salamander, who bears a startling resemblance to the Doctor, makes an appearance.

programme.title: Doctor Who

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The boys get distracted by the bikini-clad lovelies on Waikiki when they hunt for Lucy, a homeless, alcoholic fugitive. Beth is amused by the boys, but this is serious business: Tim will have to pay the bond if Lucy isn't caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in for a big surprise after he catches a fugitive named Jonaven in a sting operation.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team really have their hands full when they go after a tough guy named Nunu, who leads them on a chase through apartment complexes and a shopping mall before he's finally captured.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's feeling lucky, so he's going to try to capture two women in one day. The first, Moani, has "crazy" tattooed on her neck and is facing drug charges. The second fugitive, Jade, who turns out to be a tough catch, despite help from Jade's sister.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has problems when he goes to a small town on the Big Island of Hawaii to track down a fugitive. In a small town, everyone knows everyone else's business, making it impossible for Dog to hunt in secret.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team search for Jonah, a violent and desperate criminal facing?20 years in jail. The trail goes stale when Dog runs into evasive family members and an angry girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team go after Kandice, AKA Candy, AKA Suga, a stripper who didn't make her court appearance. They convince one of her friends to lure her to a supermarket parking lot, where Dog has an easy time fetching the fetching young thing. But then

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is trying to cut down on smoking, but it's not easy with his high-stress job. Today, he must track down Walter, a fugitive who believes that the Canadian military has planted a chip in his teeth that allows him to communicate with his van.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth designs a luxurious new office for the team and shows it off to Dog, but the bounty hunter is more interested in starting his hunt for Federico, who's been revoked for missing court dates and generally running amuck.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a rough, tough bounty hunter, but he's a softie at heart, as the two cases in this episode show.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa, who's just turned 18 and is studying to become a bondsman, gets to do some on-the-job training when she helps Dog hunt for Wayne, who's run out on a bond for second-degree assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystina is welcomed home, following her so-far successful heart transplant; Alexis' affections are pursued by a wealthy real estate baron; convinced he is not a Carrington, Adam's life begins to crumble.

programme.desc: Krystle and Blake wait helplessly as the police search for Sarah and Krystina; Adam tips Neal McVane to a stock buyout by Alexis and Dirk Maurier; Nick Kimball celebrates his recent good fortune with a marriage proposal to Dominique.

programme.desc: Blake is stunned to learn that Clay may be Ben's son; Jackie's attempt to reunite Dominique and Garrett fails; Sarah accepts her baby's death after witnessing the gravesite; Clay tells Leslie of their possible blood ties.
