programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.desc: A Confederate spy is spared death when the rope meant to hang him miraculously breaks. Or does it?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Columnist Jordan Herrick is startled to learn that a famous movie actress hasn't aged in years. Intrigued, he investigates... and soon learns a terrifying secret.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A dying man demands his family wear masks that he's given them at a Mardi Gras party.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On the day an unpopular idealist is to be executed for the killing of a racist bully, the townsfolk are shocked to see the skies have turned pitch black.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man's wish to listen to loud noise backfires.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing burglaries.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Major Ivan Kuchenko is trapped inside a hotel room with Commissar Vassiloff, a hitman, and Boris, his assistant, in the room across the street. Vassiloff has planted a bomb in the room and Ivan must find it within three hours or be blown to bits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bob and Millie wake up to find they are in a strange town. Everything appears to be props - trees, animals even cars.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jared Garrity arrives in the Old West town of Happiness, Arizona, proclaiming he can revive the dead.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A factory CEO replaces human workers with machines.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A singer's song becomes tragically real.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Two unhappy children find a happy escape in a swimming pool.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene looks for Stephanie after she mysteriously goes missing; Connie investigates a story on Trooper Davis; Carol helps Hornsby with a labor dispute at a drug farm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron and Maggie meet Gov. Pamela Milton as she tours Alexandria, Oceanside and Hilltop; Ezekiel finds himself lucky during a routine checkup; Eugene processes Max's story.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia and Elijah help a stranger from another community called Riverbend; they run into Aaron, who tells them about a mission he embarked on with Gabriel as emissaries for the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia and Elijah help Aaron and Gabriel on a rescue mission; in the chaos, Negan finds himself watching over Hershel; Sebastian coerces Daryl and Rosita into pulling a heist.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick searches for his family after emerging from a coma; Morgan and Duane help teach Rick the new rules for survival.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick unknowingly causes a group of survivors to be trapped by walkers; Rick must confront an enemy more dangerous than the undead.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick goes back to Atlanta to save a man's life; Lori and Shane deal with the surprise return of someone they thought was dead.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Another group of survivors threatens Rick, Daryl, T-Dog and Glenn, sending Rick's mission to Atlanta awry; Jim becomes unhinged back at camp.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick leads the group to the CDC hoping to cure an infected Jim, who must make a terrible life-and-death decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the group are allowed into the CDC by a strange doctor; all is not what it seems in their newfound haven.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie y Elijah aprenden nuevas tácticas de supervivencia de Negan. El grupo de Eugene quitan a los caminantes para pagar sus multas. Yumiko hace una entrevista para un trabajo importante. Daryl descubre más sobre Leah.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Reapers defienden Meridian del asalto de una horda de zombis. Pope cree que Maggie es la responsable del ataque, y los habitantes de Alexandria tratan de proteger las defensas de la ciudad, destrozadas por una violenta tormenta.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick Grimes, policía de una pequeña localidad de Georgia, despierta de un coma y repentinamente se encuentra en un mundo apocalíptico. Desorientado, en busca de su familia y una explicación a lo acontecido, Rick ha de adaptarse al nuevo orden.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick llega a caballo a Atlanta, donde encuentra una ciudad desolada. Tras escapar de una situación de peligro, Rick se une a un grupo de supervivientes en unos grandes almacenes, donde le espera un enemigo más peligroso que los zombis.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick regresa a Atlanta al sentirse culpable de haber dejado a Merle abandonado en un edificio asolado por zombis. En el campamento, la inesperada llegada de Rick causa tensión entre Lori y Shane, quien había asegurado que Rick había muerto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En Atlanta, una banda armada sorprende al grupo de Rick mientras están buscando a Merle. Entretanto, en el campamento, Jim empieza a comportarse de forma extraña, tiene premoniciones y asusta a los niños con una tragedia que se aproxima.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras el ataque al campamento, Rick conduce al grupo hacia el CDC, un recinto de la base sanitaria militar, en el que esperan encontrar un refugio seguro. Durante el trayecto, Jim debe tomar una decisión extremadamente difícil.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Un científico inquietante deja entrar a Rick y su grupo en el CDC. No obstante, hay algo extraño y los supervivientes del apocalipsis zombi empiezan a sospechar que no todo es lo que parece en el recinto.

programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon, searching for a powerful germ culture, invade the mansion of an eccentric millionaire.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A strange sea monster preying on Portuguese fishermen and their boats becomes the object of an investigation by agents West and Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon must escape a Western town whose entire population is hunting them to free the prisoner they have taken.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon determine to foil the recovery of a fortune that was originally destined to help the Confederate cause.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A meek secret agent, whom West and Pike first feel will be a detriment, proves to be invaluable as they deal with an opium ring.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A sinister scientist who employs a monstrous tuning fork as an instrument of extortion becomes James West's antagonist.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West meets up again with his old enemy, Dr. Miguelito Loveless, who is engaged in a whimsical plan for wholesale murder.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret Agent West challenges a bizarre scheme to control San Francisco Bay Shipping with rockets fired from Alcatraz Island.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: People living in New Mexico border towns are being terrified by a mysterious outlaw gang known as "Cortez and his Conquistadores."

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent West vows to destroy Raven, an organization that induces influential citizens to commit sabotage through mind conditioning.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent West's bizarre behavior convinces his cohorts that he has become another victim of the Raven's mind-conditioning plot.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A dying man's request to preserve a legacy for his young ward sends James T. West to Missouri, where he faces a wholesale conspiracy.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: An Army sergeant's letter to President Grant sends agents West and Gordon to a lonely outpost to fight a gang of terrorists.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A brass handrail is created. Mauro paints a chalkboard finish. Repaired balusters get reinstalled. Richard gives a lesson in make-up air. Work begins on a custom table. Heath talks smart electricity.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Work is complete on the Cape Ann Shingle Style project. The team tours the finished home, celebrating all of the repaired historic details and the new elements that keep with its original style.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: We take a tour of some of the past This Old House project kitchens. Follow the evolution of appliances from white to stainless as well as cabinet finishes from natural to painted.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: From large scale industry to small town makers, these factories provide the materials for our projects.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: From young blacksmiths metalworking to a woodworker who finds centuries-old lumber under water, This Old House features talented makers all over the country who make beautiful household items.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: From demo day to design, we follow every step as the homeowners decide on the components and the crew converts a decades-old butler's pantry kitchen into an up-to-date kitchen for the future.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The guys begin restoration of an 1887 Queen Anne Victorian Cottage. Kevin hears about preserving historic details while updating the interior space and creating a new garage and master suite.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Decorative Queen Anne style barge rafters are reproduced for the garage addition. The antique windows get restored and primed in the shop, re-glazed, and then returned to the house for installation.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Bricks are cleaned and repurposed for a new chimney. Staggered shingles are reapplied. Kevin O'Connor learns about glass orbs hidden on Block Island. Richard Trethewey shows a new shower drain.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: After months of meticulous restoration, the stained glass windows are ready to be reinstalled. Electrician Ben has an apprentice. Tom re-creates original shingles. Landscape meeting with homeowners.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Original house details such as the Yankee Gutters and corbels are installed. Kevin O'Connor catches up with the electrician's apprentice. Richard Trethewey looks at the new tankless hot water system.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Mark McCullough explains cobblestone aprons. The crew reinforces floor joists. Tom Silva and Jeff Sweenor install a drop finial and a swinging window. Kevin O'Connor meets with paint experts.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Ceiling mounted speakers disappear in plaster. The new HVAC system gets turned on. New garage doors are side mounted. The pool is lowered into place. The homeowner makes kitchen design choices.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Inside, the team is busy with floor installation, and the design plans for the master bath are finalized. Outside, a custom pizza oven and fireplace arrive, as well the plants and the new pool cover.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom assists with interior window trim and custom storm windows. Richard checks out an electric meter and panels. Mark follows work on the hardscape. Kevin watches the assembly of a decorative shed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Trees and sod are transplanted with Jenn, while a custom deck hatch is installed to access the basement. Inside, Kevin and Jeff assemble a smart lock system and Tom helps mount a unique range hood.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Work happens in the kitchen. Kevin and Tom tackle the molding. The pantry gets a secret door. Countertops, backsplash and tile are installed. A new wood mantle goes around the gas fireplace.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The abandoned Seaside Victorian Cottage is restored to its original beauty. A new addition matches the existing architectural details. New hardscape and landscape anchor it to the corner lot.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The show returns to Dorchester, MA, the home of the first This Old House project, to follow the renovation of a triple decker that burned from illegal fireworks.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Asbestos is removed from exposed ductwork. Richard meets the new plumber. Jenn visits a community garden. A local historian speaks about triple deckers. Tom and Charlie pull off the melted siding.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The back porches are brought to code. Ice blasting is used to get rid of the fire odor. New vinyl siding gets installed. Homeowner Carol considers new accent colors to match. Framing begins inside.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Jenn creates a patio building team. Heath rewires a section with intact plaster. Charlie and Tom hang a fire rated door. Richard explains how a tub fits in. Kevin and Tom install a replacement window.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom works with new apprentices. Kevin meets them and learns about YouthBuild. Homeowner Carol looks at kitchen cabinets and counters. Richard works with James on separate HVAC systems.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Mauro works with the apprentices to fix plaster damage. Richard meets plumber Ronnette about the new sprinkler system. Carol and her sister shop for tile. The glass doors get repaired by an expert.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin reinstall cabinets that survived the fire. Tom teaches apprentices to trim a window. HVAC contractor James shows Richard the plan for hot water. Carol and her sister shop for appliances.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The apprentices attend a roofing class and then put their skills to practice. Back at the triple decker, a vinyl floor goes in. Mauro touches up the cabinets. Tom and Charlie install French doors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Well over a year and a half since the fire, the triple decker is just about ready for the homeowners to return. Kevin O'Connor checks out what's left to do in all three units, both inside and out.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack finds himself in a state of panic when he juggles three gourmet dinners in three different apartments.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's first day behind the grill at a diner heats up hilariously when his attractive boss tries to spice up her life. Guest Star(s): Ellen Travolta

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes Chrissy's friend is the perfect sweetie to bring home to mom, until Janet discovers she's a high-priced call girl headed for a wild convention.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack snows a stunning skier named Inga into believing he's a downhill champion.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet frantically tries to keep Jack and Larry from finding out they are both dating the same beautiful woman.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has to do a lot of double-talking on his first night as a busboy at a posh French restaurant when the gang comes to dinner expecting him to be the head chef. Guest Star(s): Michael Lombard

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Chrissy can't pay her share of the rent, she's helped by her cute, clever but catastrophically clumsy cousin, Cindy. Guest Star(s): Karen Austin

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet learns that Cindy's boss is asking for favors above and beyond the call of duty.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity lands Jack an impressive chef's post that makes him the unwitting target of a bullying bookie and the local police.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: An older woman adopts Jack as her surrogate son and smothers him with motherly love.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack plays cupid to his girlfriend's widowed father, but his arrows misfire when the love-starved older man makes Janet his target.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The roommates play a game of musical beds after Janet tells her visiting parents that she and Jack are newlyweds.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When a wealthy man becomes obsessed with making a reluctant Cindy his bride, Jack and Janet hatch a strange plot to stop the ceremony. Guest Star(s): Jeffrey Tambor

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Three's company, but four's a weird crowd when Ralph Furley loses his job and moves in with Jack, Janet, and Cindy.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry's sly suggestion that he and Jack trade apartments after Jack has a tiff with the girls gives lustful Larry the chance to really put the move on Janet and Cindy.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: While teaching at his old cooking school, Jack finds himself in a stew when Dean Traver's voluptuous niece, Betty Jane, cooks up a seductive plan to win an "A".

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Accident-prone Cindy appears to have taken the ultimate misstep when she starts collecting maternity clothes, leading Jack to make an astonishingly funny marriage proposal. Guest Star(s): Frances Lee McCain

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A surprise visit by the battling Ropers turns into a romantic triangle when lusty Helen seeks solace from Jack and Janet and lands in the arms of Ralph Furley. Guest Star(s): Norman Fell and Audra Lindley

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack poses as his own twin to romance Ralph Furley's attractive visiting niece.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack gets a preview of the great hereafter when Larry hatches a plan to save him from his girl's murderously jealous other boyfriend.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet turn detectives when Cindy mysteriously vanishes and crazy clues indicate that their bouncy roommate has met with foul play.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack's never-ending schemes to endear himself to a beautiful woman totally backfire, he decides to forego his little white lies for honesty.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet find a new roommate after Cindy moves off to dormitory life at nearby UCLA. She's Terri Alden, an emergency room nurse who starts off on the wrong foot with Jack in this sixth-season opener.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry has made his choice for a new roommate and Jack and Larry begin devising a plan to get rid of Terri.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: To boost Jack's confidence, Terri turns on the charm, causing Janet to suspect that her new roommate's interest in Jack is more than platonic.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri thinks an attractive older woman's visit to Jack are weekly lessons in lovemaking and, in disgust, decides to move out.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri and Jack believe that Janet will have to make it with her dance instructor if she wants to make it as a dancer.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs Larry Holmes
programme.desc: On June 19th, 1992 Evander Holyfield battles Larry Holmes for the IBF, WBA, and WBC World Heavyweight title they battled at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas the bout went a full twelve rounds and ended in a unanimous decision win for Holyfield.

programme.title: Felix Trinidad vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On September 18th, 1999 Felix Trinidad and Oscar De La Hoya faced eachother for the IBF and WBC World welterweight title at the Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas that ended in a majority decision win for Trinidad.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Jose Luis Castillo 1
programme.desc: On April 20th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather fought Jose Luis Castillo for the first time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayeather vs Jose Luis Castillo 2
programme.desc: On December 7th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather faced Jose Luis Castillo for a second time at Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles resulting in a unamimous decision win for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather Jr vs Justin Juuko
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 1999 Floyd Mayweather fought Justin Juuko at the Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for the WBC World Super featherweight title with the bout ending in round nine resulting in a victory for Mayweather

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: On June 25th, 2005 Floyd Mayweather fought Arturo Gatti at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City for the WBC World Super Lightweight title with Gatti down in round 1 the fight ended in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Carlos Alberto Ramon Rios
programme.desc: On February 17th, 1999, Floyd Mayweather fought Carlos Rios for the WBC Super Featherweight Title in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Rios was a tough opponent for Mayweather, but Mayweather prevailed and showed out in front of his hometown, winning by UD.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs DeMarcus Corley
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 2004 Floyd Mayweather fought DeMarcus Corley at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City for the WBC World Light Welterweight Title eliminator with Corely going down in round 8 and round 10 resulting in a win for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Diego Corrales
programme.desc: On January 20th, 2001 Floyd Mayweather faced Diego Corrales in a battle for the WBC World super feather weight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas ending in a technical knockout victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Hector Arroyo
programme.desc: On January 9th, 1998, Floyd Mayweather fought Hector Arroyo in a featherweight bout in Biloxi, Mississippi. A young Mayweather hungry for a title shot came out quick against Arroyo, stopping him in the fifth round of the fight.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Larry O'Shields
programme.desc: On June 14th, 1997, Floyd Mayweather fought Larry O'Shields in a lightweight bout at the Alamodome in San Antonio, Texas. A young Mayweather showed his impressive speed and agility, earning a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Manny Pacquiao
programme.desc: On May 2nd, 2015, Floyd Mayweather fought Manny Pacquiao in what was labeled as the "Fight of the Century." Floyd Mayweather emerged victorious via a unanimous decision, showcasing his exceptional defensive skills against Pacquiao's aggressive style.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Phillip N'dou
programme.desc: On November 1st, 2003 Floyd Mayweather and Phillip N'dou fought eachother for the WBC world lightweight title at the Van Andel Arena in Grand Rapids with Mayweather ending the bout early for a technical knockout victory

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On April 8th, 2006, Floyd Mayweather fought Zab Judah for the IBF and IBO Welterweight Titles at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. In a fight with a dramatic melee in round 10, Mayweather cruised in the later rounds to win by unanimous decision.

programme.title: Freddie Roach vs Joe Ruelaz
programme.desc: On August 9th, 1984, Freddie Roach fought Joe Ruelaz in a super featherweight bout in Las Vegas. The more experienced Roach made easy work of Ruelaz, stopping him in the fourth round.

programme.title: Freddie Roach vs Mario Chavez
programme.desc: On May 28th, 1981 Freddie Roach faced Mario Chavez at the Hacienda Hotel in Las Vegas resulting in a unanimous decision win for Roach.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Day 1 of the new Ice Road season begins. There are 6,000 loads of freight to move in just 12 weeks to the oil camps of Alaska's North Slope. The 400 plus miles stretch from Fairbanks to the remote outpost of Deadhorse.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: On Alaska's North Slope, a new ice road season has just begun. Carlile Transportation has less than three months to haul 2,000 loads from Fairbanks to Deadhorse--the gateway to the Prudhoe Bay oil fields.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: It's three weeks into the winter season in Northern Alaska, and Carlile Transportation has only moved 500 of the 2,000 loads it needs to transport to the Prudhoe Bay oil fields. The clock is ticking and an arctic storm is brewing.

programme.title: Ax Men

programme.title: Ax Men

programme.title: Ax Men

programme.title: Ax Men

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik proves his The Winged Dragon of Ra is the strongest Egyptian God Card by destroying Slifer the Sky Dragon! None of Yugi's cards can withstand its assault, but a gift from Kaiba may turn the duel around…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi can't strike Marik's life points, and with every turn that passes, Marik is one step closer to taking down Yugi with a final strike from The Winged Dragon of Ra...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Yugi at the end of his ropes and the maniacal Marik waging all-out war, can Marik's oldest friend reach Marik in time to help him come to his senses before his insanity overwhelms him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Will the combined force of all of Yugi's monsters be enough to defeat an Egyptian God that terminated two other powerful Egyptian Gods? The fate of the world hangs in the balance with the finale of the Battle City Tournament!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: KaibaCorp Island is set to explode in mere minutes, but the blimp's engines are offline! Can Yugi and friends escape from the island in time, or will they sink to the bottom of the sea?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa and Serenity tour around the Town of Domino and reminisce about their friends' battles during Battle City, they learn how much they've grown and far they've come... and how far they have left to go!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian God Cards are stolen! A terrifying new villain emerges! Real monsters begin to appear around the world! Can Yugi and the gang discover how these strange events are connected before the planet is destroyed?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Seal of Orichalcos, not only can Gurimo have ten monsters at once, but each creature receives a power boost from Orichalcos's malevolent energies! Yugi better find a way to protect himself against Gurimo's horde!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only is our world on the brink of apocalypse, but an entire domain of monsters is also on the verge of collapse! Both Earth and the monster domain must unite and fight against the largest terror they have ever faced!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the gang set off on a cross-country trek when they're asked for help from a one-eyed former foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba returns to Duelist Kingdom for a showdown against Pegasus! Will Kaiba discover the secret behind Pegasus's strategies before he loses his soul, just like he did on his first trip to Duelist Kingdom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only does Alister's fiend gain attack points for every fiery monster on the field, but it can also take control of Kaiba's monsters! Will Alister get his revenge, or will Kaiba get aid from the monster domain?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai's back to help Yugi take down Dartz and save the world from annihilation... or is a topsy-turvy twist in the works?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai has joined the enemy! Is she brainwashed, or is there some deeper reason for her unexpected transformation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Taking advantage of the Seal of Orichalcos, Mai coordinates her Harpie Ladies to whittle Joey's forces into waste! Is this the last we'll see of him, or will a legendary guardian recognize Joey as a true duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the potent powers of Claw of Hermos, Joey transforms Time Wizard into an almighty... hammer? Can Joey master the uncanny abilities of his new card to pound Mai's Harpie Ladies before they slash him to shreds?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Professor Hawkins has discovered startling connections between the world's conundrums, the Orichalcos stones and an ancient lost civilization.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a Wild West showdown between Yugi and his fiercest challenge yet: Rafael and his guardian monsters.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi calls on the legendary strength of Timaeus, but when it's not enough to crack Rafael's defense, will Yugi resort to desperate measures and go against everything he believes in to make the riskiest move of his life?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Using the abilities of Seal of Orichalcos, Yugi grinds Rafael's guardians, but he's also succumbing to the card's evil influence. As darkness grows within his heart, the consequences of his non-heroic acts may be his undoing.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Dartz has captured Yugi's soul! Broken and unmotivated, how will our heroes ever rescue Yugi, especially when Dartz has a duo of nefarious new recruits ready to eradicate them?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: A cross-country expedition turns tragic when Dartz's new duelists separate Yugi from Joey in order to capture their souls separately.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Nothing will stop Weevil and Rex Raptor from quenching their thirst for revenge by capturing Yugi and Joey's souls!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Having lost the trust of Timaeus, Yugi can no longer use his guardian dragon against Weevil's insect invasion. Discouraged and confused, Yugi has lost his dueling instincts.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is on a vision quest where he must travel through a past of evil to find and conquer his greatest foe... himself.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is in no shape to duel... but Dartz doesn't care! Dartz sends out his ancient annihilator Orichalcos Soldier to finish Yugi once and for all.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Valon is ready to take on the world and fight... for the heart of Mai? And the first adversaries standing in his way are Duke and Rebecca!

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Nora targets Dice as a way to get revenge on Sam; Sam and Cat are forced to ask Nevel for help.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: While helping Goomer with a bully at his gym, Sam knocks out an MMA champion.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat try to avoid getting in trouble when they accidentally knock out musician Del DeVille.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Cat takes Dice to a hair modeling job in Arizona; Sam is stuck at home with Nona for a weekend roommate.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Former iCarly sidekick Sam Puckett teams up with Hollywood Arts High School student Cat Valentine to take over Cat's grandmother's babysitting service.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Cat is devastated when a cable network cancels a TV show about a family of cross-dressers.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat take care of a goat and try to win over their landlord's son, who wants them evicted. Dice starts managing Goomer, a dumb MMA fighter.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat babysit two polite British girls; Sam tries to fulfill a community service requirement at Elderly Acres.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Goes Platinum Pt. 1
programme.desc: Tori gets an opportunity to perform a song at a big awards program, but she's pushed into altering everything about herself in the process.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Goes Platinum Pt. 2
programme.desc: Tori gets to sing at a big music awards show, but the producer wants to totally change her look and behavior. Tori agrees, but finds that she doesn't like her new image.

programme.title: Victorious: Opposite Date
programme.desc: After a group activity falls apart Tori and Beck decide to go on an "Opposite Date" where they do things that people would never do on a REAL date.

programme.title: Victorious: Cell Block
programme.desc: Sikowitz challenges the kids to go a week without using their phones, laptops, or other portable electronic devices. The kids accept and quickly realize it's not going to be as easy as they thought.

programme.title: Victorious: Three Girls And A Moose
programme.desc: Tori, Cat, and Jade compete with each other to win the affection of Beck's big, handsome, hockey-loving Canadian friend, Moose.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Fixes Beck & Jade
programme.desc: Beck wants to ask a girl out but is worried about Jade's reaction, so Tori and Andre attempt to get Jade a date to even the playing field. Robbie works to remove a butterfly stuck in Cat's ear.

programme.title: Victorious: Robbie Sells Rex
programme.desc: Mason Thornesmith's bratty 12-year-old kid wants to buy Rex from Robbie. Meanwhile, a masked flour thrower is on the loose in Hollywood Arts.

programme.title: Victorious: The Bad Roommate
programme.desc: Andre stays with Tori to work on a song for class. They quickly find they aren't the best roommates. Jade discovers an unflattering picture of herself on the internet, and conspires to take it down.

programme.title: Victorious: Victori-Yes
programme.desc: Sikowitz challenges the students to say yes to everything for one week. The gang agrees, and they soon find themselves out of their respective comfort zones.

programme.title: Victorious: Brain Squeezers
programme.desc: Tori is selected to be the team captain for a new game show, Brain Squeezers. She has to choose 3 teammates to compete with her and quickly becomes overwhelmed by requests from the gang.

programme.title: Victorious: Star-Spangled Tori
programme.desc: When Tori gets invited to sing the national anthem at a televised basketball game, she worries she'll forget the lyrics, but ends up in a much more embarrassing encounter with the team's mascot.

programme.title: Victorious: One Thousand Berry Balls
programme.desc: Andre gets Tori a job at a frozen yogurt stand, but work may keep them from performing at the Hollywood Arts Cowboy Luau. Robbie wants to ask Cat to the luau, but asks someone else, making Cat jealous.

programme.title: Victorious: The Slap Fight
programme.desc: Tori and the gang compete to see who can get the most followers on The Slap. But when they get caught up in the competition, they neglect their schoolwork and their friendships.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Goes Platinum
programme.desc: Tori wins a contest to sing the opening number at a big music awards show, but the producer wants to totally change her look and behavior. Tori agrees, but finds that she doesn't like her new image.

programme.title: Victorious: Freak the Freak Out
programme.desc: Tori's friends sing at a local karaoke club and end up competing with a pair of stuck-up girls who are regular performers there. Competing with those girls proves to be more difficult than they expect, since one of the girls' father owns the club.

programme.title: Victorious: Pilot
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: Victorious: The Bird Scene
programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, André and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls, with disastrous results.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly bans T-Bo from the loft, he retaliates by not letting Carly into the Groovy Smoothie. Meanwhile, Freddie and Gibby discover being in a band has many perks and a few drawbacks.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam learns her mom is in a Vegas jail, the gang decides to gather their most prized possessions, drive to Vegas and pawn their stuff to make enough money to bail her out.
